## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added or updated for every changed behaviour
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `[Unreleased]`
- [ ] If methodology changed: spec section updated and linked here
- [ ] If output schema changed: `GCEFResults` docstring and `report.py` updated

- [ ] `pytest tests/` passes locally
